text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You've been staring at me for a while now.
There something you need from the great
Sweepy?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Um, well, I was wondering if you'd let me
borrow your magical girl clothes and stuff♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I want to be a cute magical girl. That'd be so grammable!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It'd be nice to have another magical girl
around, but why now of all times?
Couldn't you have said something earlier?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well, I would have asked sooner… but I just
couldn't work up the courage…

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you're the one and only Sweepy…
I've admired your magicalness for so long!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Oh, you don't… mind, do you?
Sniffy-sniff…

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
W-Well, I guess it's fine! Look, I'll lend you
some clothes already, okay?
